# Schema: PUBLIC.BOOKS

# Contact details for book authors
"AUTHORS"
--------------------
  "ID" "INTEGER" PK
  "FIRSTNAME" "VARCHAR(20)" INDEX
  "LASTNAME" "VARCHAR(20)" INDEX
  "ADDRESS1" "VARCHAR(255)" NULLABLE
  "ADDRESS2" "VARCHAR(255)" NULLABLE
  "CITY" "VARCHAR(50)" INDEX NULLABLE
  "STATE" "CHARACTER(2)" INDEX NULLABLE
  "POSTALCODE" "VARCHAR(10)" INDEX NULLABLE
  "COUNTRY" "VARCHAR(50)" INDEX NULLABLE

# Details for published books
"BOOKS"
--------------------
  "ID" "INTEGER" PK
  "TITLE" "VARCHAR(255)"
  "DESCRIPTION" "VARCHAR(255)" NULLABLE
  "PUBLISHERID" "INTEGER"
  "PUBLICATIONDATE" "DATE" NULLABLE
  "PRICE" "DOUBLE(64, 0)" NULLABLE
  "PREVIOUSEDITIONID" "INTEGER" UNIQUE NULLABLE FK >- "BOOKS"."ID"

"Celebrities"
--------------------
  "Id" "INTEGER" PK
  "NAME" "VARCHAR(20)" NULLABLE

"COUPONS"
--------------------
  "ID" "INTEGER" PK
  "DATA" "CLOB" NULLABLE
  "COUPONS" "INTEGER ARRAY" NULLABLE
  "BOOKS" "VARCHAR(20) ARRAY[10]" NULLABLE

"CUSTOMERS"
--------------------
  "ID" "INTEGER" PK
  "FIRSTNAME" "NAME_TYPE(100)"
  "LASTNAME" "NAME_TYPE(100)"
  "AGE" "AGE_TYPE" NULLABLE

# List of book publishers
"PUBLISHERS"
--------------------
  "ID" "INTEGER" PK AUTOINCREMENT
  "PUBLISHER" "VARCHAR(255)" NULLABLE

# Relationship between books and their authors,  along with the latest updated information
"BOOKAUTHORS"
--------------------
  "BOOKID" "INTEGER" UNIQUE FK >- "BOOKS"."ID"
  "AUTHORID" "INTEGER" UNIQUE FK >- "AUTHORS"."ID"
  "SOMEDATA" "VARCHAR(30)" NULLABLE

"Celebrity Updates"
--------------------
  "Celebrity Id" "INTEGER" PK FK >- "Celebrities"."Id"
  "UPDATE" "VARCHAR(20)" NULLABLE

"CUSTOMERDATA"
--------------------
  "CUSTOMERID" "INTEGER" PK FK >- "CUSTOMERS"."ID"
  "DATAID" "INTEGER" PK
  "DATA" "VALID_STRING(20)" NULLABLE

"ΒΙΒΛΊΑ"
--------------------
  "ΜΟΝΑΔΙΚΌΣ" "SMALLINT" PK
  "ΤΊΤΛΟΣ" "VARCHAR(255)"
  "ΠΕΡΙΓΡΑΦΉ" "VARCHAR(255)" NULLABLE
  "ΕΚΔΌΤΗΣ" "SMALLINT" INDEX FK >- "PUBLISHERS"."ID"

"AUTHORSLIST"
--------------------
  "ID" "INTEGER" NULLABLE
  "FIRSTNAME" "VARCHAR(20)" NULLABLE
  "LASTNAME" "VARCHAR(20)" NULLABLE

# Schema: PUBLIC."PUBLISHER SALES"

"REGIONS"
--------------------
  "CITY" "VARCHAR(50)"
  "STATE" "VARCHAR(2)"
  "POSTALCODE" "VARCHAR(10)" PK
  "COUNTRY" "VARCHAR(50)" PK

"SALESDATA"
--------------------
  "SALESDATAID" "INTEGER" UNIQUE NULLABLE
  "YEARLYAMOUNT" "DOUBLE(64, 0)" NULLABLE

"SALES"
--------------------
  "POSTALCODE" "VARCHAR(10)" INDEX FK >- "REGIONS"."POSTALCODE"
  "COUNTRY" "VARCHAR(50)" INDEX FK >- "REGIONS"."COUNTRY"
  "BOOKID" "INTEGER" INDEX NULLABLE FK >- "BOOKS"."ID"
  "COUPON_ID" "INTEGER" NULLABLE
  "PERIODENDDATE" "DATE" NULLABLE
  "TOTALAMOUNT" "DOUBLE(64, 0)" NULLABLE
  "SALESDATAID" "INTEGER" INDEX NULLABLE FK >- "SALESDATA"."SALESDATAID"
